last_deploy.commit_subject: Last known build stamp from version.json — update on next deploy
last_deploy.notes: Written automatically by docker deploy and deploy.sh on success.

for_ai: At session start: read this file and Comserv/version.json. Compare last_deploy.commit to `git rev-parse HEAD`. If HEAD is ahead, production errors may be fixed locally but not deployed yet. Close Application Error Audit todos only after deploy confirms that commit is live.
